name: @pranshulsoni/flowwatch
description: Embedded operations dashboard, workflow runner, feature flags, tracing, error capture, health checks, and AI diagnostics for Express backends.
author: Pranshul Soni

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('../../README.md')) { let content = fs.readFileSync('../../README.md', 'utf8'); content = content.replace('assets/logo.png?v=4', 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PranshulSoni/FlowWatch/main/assets/logo.png?v=4'); fs.writeFileSync('./README.md', content); }" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-dashboard-static.cjs
